name: Dream Garden
overview: A relationship blogger confident in her love expertise finds herself clashing with a cold, analytical psychologist on a variety show, only to end up working as his assistant. As their opposing views spark both friction and growth, fate draws them into an unexpected journey of understanding the heart.

trailers.title: 【沉睡花园】定档12月13日：龚俊乔欣上演“真假”情感专家 | Dream Garden - Trailer | ENG SUB
